title: Systems Architecture
description: Designing high-performance backend infrastructures and scalable microservices. I specialize in building robust systems that handle complex data flows with minimal latency.

title: Low-level Engineering
description: Developing performance-critical software and CLI tools. My expertise lies in memory-efficient programming and system-level integrations that push the boundaries of hardware.

title: Immersive Product Design
description: Crafting high-fidelity, interactive web experiences. I bridge the gap between design and engineering by implementing complex animations and state-of-the-art UI/UX patterns.
